scripts.setup: test -f .env || cp .env.example .env && npm run build -w shared && npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
scripts.dev: test -f backend/prisma/dev.db && concurrently "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend" || npm run setup && concurrently "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
